summary: Iteration 58: Testing NEW features - Emergency 112 Integration, Trial Reminders, Analytics Export, and Frontend date/text updates. All 14 backend tests PASSED. All 10 frontend verification checks PASSED.

BACKEND: GET /api/emergency/112/history - requires authentication (401 without)
BACKEND: GET /api/emergency/112/history - returns emergency history list
BACKEND: GET /api/admin/trial-status - requires authentication (401 without)
BACKEND: GET /api/admin/trial-status - returns trial user counts (total_trial_users, expiring_in_3_days, already_expired, active_trials)
BACKEND: POST /api/admin/send-trial-reminders - requires authentication (401 without)
BACKEND: POST /api/admin/send-trial-reminders - admin can send trial reminders (returns reminders_sent, expired_notified)
BACKEND: GET /api/admin/analytics/export - requires authentication (401 without)
BACKEND: GET /api/admin/analytics/export - returns analytics data (users, orders, safety metrics, bigquery_schema)

BACKEND: GET /api/admin/analytics/users-csv - returns CSV file with proper headers (Content-Type: text/csv)
BACKEND: Health check endpoint works

FRONTEND: Home page loads correctly with ManoProtect branding

context_for_next_testing_agent: NEW features iteration_58 fully tested. Key endpoints verified: POST /api/emergency/112 (requires auth, coordinates, returns call_url='tel:112', maps_url, contacts_notified, emergency_id), GET /api/emergency/112/history, GET /api/admin/trial-status (returns trial counts), POST /api/admin/send-trial-reminders (admin only), GET /api/admin/analytics/export (returns users, orders, safety metrics with bigquery_schema), GET /api/admin/analytics/users-csv (returns CSV file). Frontend verified: dates updated to '30 de Marzo 2026', Sentinel J shows 'Jóvenes 3 - 12 años, 8 correas intercambiables · GPS · Botón SOS', Sentinel S shows 'Niños 6-14, Cerámica + rose gold · Anti-retirada · Sirena 120dB'. Subscription modal working for all products.

subscription_modal.triggered_by: Submit order form with Basic product selected
